title: Dept. of Engineering Opens Comment Period for Stormwater Management
summary: The City of Syracuse Department of Engineering has opened a public comment period (through March 25, 2026) for its Stormwater Management Plan (SWMP) and MS4 Annual Report, both required by NYS DEC's SPDES General Permit. The SWMP outlines stormwater pollution reduction efforts and best management practices; the Annual Report reviews 2025 progress and sets 2026 goals. This is a compliance-driven initiative to reduce sediment and pollution entering surface and groundwater.

entity_refs.name: New York State Department of Environmental Conservation

political_signal.description: State regulatory compliance activity; demonstrates alignment with NYSDEC environmental protection mandates through required SPDES permit administration and public engagement.
